subject: A meadow crime scene: a dead white creature lies near a shattered tree stump, teal liquid weeping from the wound
description: A peaceful garden meadow has been violated: a large tree stump is broken and split, with teal-blue liquid dripping from the gash like unnatural sap or blood. A small white animal — deer or hare — lies still in the grass at the base of the stump, possibly dead. White flowers carpet the foreground. In the misty background, gothic spire architecture rises through haze and what appear to be white birds or petals scatter in the air. The scene is simultaneously beautiful and mournful.
foreground: White flowers, fallen white creature, broken tree stump with teal drips
background: Misty gothic spires, scattered white birds or petals
emotion: sorrowful desolation; beauty disrupted by violence
